title: liparis bootanensis var. uchiyamae
intro: Liparis bootanensis var. uchiyamae, also known as Uchiyama's Liparis, is a rare and lesser-known orchid species native to the Himalayas. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Liparis bootanensis var. uchiyamae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal decoctions, infusions, or dried extracts for consumption, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
